description: You are a robotic manipulation researcher testing a force-closure grasping algorithm in Webots. Configure the physics for the interaction between the silicone-padded gripper and the glass object. Set the contactMaterial for 'LEFT_PAD' and 'RIGHT_PAD' to 'silicone' and for 'TARGET_OBJECT' to 'glass'. Define a ContactProperties entry in WorldInfo for the 'silicone' and 'glass' interaction with a coulombFriction of 0.15 and bounce of 0.0. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/slippery_grasp.wbt.
